contribution_description:
[CONTRIBUTION EVENT]
- Type: Time (Minutes)
- Amount: 30
- Description: Credentialing program pages — Phase 0 spec doc
  
  Pull requests (GitHub evidence):
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/agentic_ai_context/pull/143
  
  Details:
  Drafted and shipped CREDENTIALING_PROGRAM_PAGES.md as Phase 0 of a new platform surface — per-program credentialing pages on truesight.me that let partner organizations (Tribo Bahia Mirim capoeira lineage, ERA Professionals' Butterfly Effect via Bilal, future) co-brand their cohort listings and per-participant CV pages on our infrastructure.
  
  Why this lands as documentation before code: the URL shape gets etched into printed certificate QR codes. Once a partner cohort hands out physical certs, the path the QR resolves to must work indefinitely — that's a one-way decision worth a written record before any printed asset goes out.
  
  The doc pins:
  - URL shape: truesight.me/programs/<program-slug>/credentials/#<member-slug> (permanent, never retired even on white-label upgrade)
  - File layout under truesight_me/programs/<slug>/
  - Manifest schema for per-program metadata + co-brand info
  - Data sources: existing TrueSightDAO/lineage-credentials repo, no new data layer
  - Fetch resilience: jsDelivr primary + raw.github fallback (matches the pattern shipped in truesight_me_beta#82)
  - Co-branding rules across landing / members / credentials wrapper
  - Consent model for minors: cert issuance is the opt-in moment; public_listable flag with no-404-on-withdrawal rule
  - 6-phase rollout (Phase 0 done; Phase 1 ships truesight_me code next)
  - Open questions punted to later phases (slug minting for non-DAO participants, photo consent, multi-program memberships)
  
  CONTEXT_UPDATES.md appended with a suggested README.md / PROJECT_INDEX.md update line per OPERATING_INSTRUCTIONS.md §4.3 — operator approval needed before editing canonical files.
  
  PR: TrueSightDAO/agentic_ai_context#143 (squash-merged c58ad14).
- Contributor(s): Gary Teh
- TDG Issued: 50.00
- Attached Filename: N/A
- Destination Contribution File Location: N/A
